Class PasswordEvaluator

java.lang.Object
guiTools.PasswordEvaluator
public class PasswordEvaluator extends Object

Title: PasswordEvaluator Class.

Description: A Java

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2022

Version:
1.00 2022-02-25 A set of semi-automated test cases, 2.00 2024-09-22 Updated for use at ASU changes made by Rio McCue for use in Team Project 1

  • Constructor Details

    • PasswordEvaluator

      public PasswordEvaluator()

      Method: PasswordEvaluator()

      Description: This default constructor is not used in this system.

  • Method Details

    • evaluatePassword

      public static String evaluatePassword(String input)

      Title: evaluatePassword - Public Method

      Description: This method is a mechanical transformation of a Directed Graph diagram into a Java method. This method is used by both the GUI version of the application as well as the testing automation version.

      Parameters:
      input - The input string evaluated by the directed graph processing
      Returns:
      An output string that is empty if every things is okay or it will be a string with a helpful description of the error follow by two lines that shows the input line follow by a line with an up arrow at the point where the error was found.
